summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Stage 6 Lode expected change, risk hint, preview post-check, and preview failure classification slice.
reviewed_validation_summary: `python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py`; `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item LODE-182 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item LODE-182 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item LODE-182 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec stays inside Lode package truth and excludes true writes, runtime execution, private material, Core envelopes, and App UI.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to package assets, validator checks, and item-specific carrier.
